business_goal: Any component — however late it mounts — can query getServerState() or subscribe subscribeServerState() and immediately learn {status, port}; the example apps visibly render idle/starting/ready:port/failed via the new readiness indicator (fixes issue #6; UC-ObserveReadiness, breadboard N5/N6/U2, slices V2+U2 demo).
